title: Wednesday Founders Lunch @ Four Day Ray
location: Four Day Ray Brewing, 11671 Lantern Rd, Fishers IN
description: Weekly midweek meetup for lab members and guests. Grab a craft beer, talk shop, meet a founder. No agenda, just good people.

title: Nickel Plate Trail Walk — Midday Reset
location: Nickel Plate Trail, Roy G. Holland Park Trailhead, Fishers IN
description: Leave your desk for 45 minutes. Walk the trail, clear your head, and catch up with fellow founders. Meet at the lab — we walk together.

title: Indiana IoT Lab Monthly Meetup
location: Indiana IoT Lab, 9059 Technology Lane, Fishers IN
description: Monthly gathering for IoT innovators, entrepreneurs, and curious minds. Demo night format — bring something to show.

title: Startup Pitch Night
location: Indiana IoT Lab, 9059 Technology Lane, Fishers IN
description: Early-stage founders pitch their IoT ideas to the community. 5-minute pitches, honest feedback, no investors required.

title: Wednesday Happy Hour @ HopCat Fishers
description: End the workday with fellow makers and founders. Informal, no badge required. Just show up and connect.

title: IoT Hardware Workshop
location: Indiana IoT Lab, 9059 Technology Lane, Fishers IN
description: Hands-on workshop: sensors, microcontrollers, and connected devices. Bring your laptop. Components provided.

title: Trail & Talk — Nickel Plate Walk
location: Nickel Plate Trail, Roy G. Holland Park Trailhead, Fishers IN
description: Another midday walk along Nickel Plate Trail. Great for clearing your head and connecting with other lab members. Meet at the IoT Lab.

title: Coffee & Connect
location: Indiana IoT Lab, 9059 Technology Lane, Fishers IN
description: Casual morning networking for members, partners, and newcomers. Coffee's on. Stories are free.

title: Wednesday Founders Lunch @ Four Day Ray
location: Four Day Ray Brewing, 11671 Lantern Rd, Fishers IN
description: Weekly midweek founders lunch. Bring a friend, a problem, or just yourself. Good food and good company guaranteed.

title: Member Showcase & Collaboration Night
location: Indiana IoT Lab, 9059 Technology Lane, Fishers IN
description: Lab members show what they're building. Looking for a co-founder, collaborator, or just feedback? This is the night.
